overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a third-person driving sequence through a futuristic dystopian city at dusk. The player drives a gold convertible through industrial urban streets, elevated highways, and past neon-lit buildings with smokestacks visible against a twilight sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered industrial arterial beneath elevated highway

events.description: vehicle accelerates from stop at red traffic light under the elevated highway
vehicle swerves slightly to avoid obstacle while maintaining high speed

agents.ego_description: accelerating through covered urban street beneath massive concrete highway structure, navigating between support pillars

notable_agents.action: distant car driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining distance

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel overpass creating a canopy over the street with visible support beams
red traffic signal suspended over the road
dark industrial facade with minimal windows and utilitarian architecture
horizontal red neon light strips mounted on the left wall creating cyberpunk aesthetic
thick cylindrical pillars supporting the elevated highway structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a gold convertible accelerating beneath a massive elevated highway structure in an industrial district. Red neon strips illuminate the left wall while concrete pillars line the right. The vehicle navigates the covered arterial road, passing under the shadow of the overpass with sparse traffic ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from covered highway to open palm-lined boulevard

events.description: exits covered highway area into more open street with visible sky and palm trees
vehicle executes sharp right turn at intersection, changing direction from north to east

agents.ego_description: executing a sharp right turn at intersection then accelerating down palm-lined street toward the city center

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the street, silhouetted against the dusk sky
full moon visible in the twilight sky above the city skyline
distant futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows forming the downtown horizon
large digital advertisement screen mounted on a building facade

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges from under the elevated highway into a more open boulevard lined with palm trees. A sharp right turn transitions the scene from the enclosed industrial zone to a wider street with the moon and distant city skyline now visible against the purple dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open multi-lane highway approaching industrial district

events.description: industrial smokestacks become visible on the horizon, indicating approach to factory zone

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed on wide open highway, overtaking other vehicles while approaching industrial area

notable_agents.action: black sedan overtaking on the left side, moving faster than ego vehicle

entered.detail: tall factory chimneys emitting smoke into the evening sky, silhouetted against the sunset
large industrial complex with corrugated metal walls and pipe structures
elevated road structure crossing perpendicular to the current path

segments.scene_description: Driving on a wide open highway with the moon visible overhead, the scene transitions toward an industrial district marked by prominent smokestacks on the horizon. The vehicle overtakes a black sedan while factory buildings and highway overpasses begin to dominate the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial highway corridor with factories and smokestacks

events.description: approaching and passing through intersection with traffic lights changing from red to green
vehicle changes lanes to the right to navigate around slower traffic

agents.ego_description: navigating through moderate traffic on industrial highway, changing lanes and stopping at traffic signals

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving parallel in the right lane, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: massive illuminated advertisement structure with rotating digital display
extensive industrial facility with multiple buildings and glowing windows
jersey barriers lining the right side of the highway separating lanes

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels through a heavily industrialized corridor with smokestacks lining the left side and factory complexes on the right. Large billboards and traffic lights punctuate the scene as the car navigates moderate traffic, changing lanes and stopping at a red light before proceeding.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved elevated highway with massive overpass structure

events.description: road curves gently to the right as vehicle enters sweeping highway bend
passing beneath massive curved overpass structure that dominates the skyline

agents.ego_description: navigating a sweeping right-hand curve on the highway, maintaining high speed while passing under monumental overpass structures

entered.detail: massive sweeping concrete and steel overpass arching across the highway, creating a dramatic architectural frame
overhead gantry with illuminated directional signs suspended over the road

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the vehicle navigating a sweeping right curve on an elevated highway, passing beneath a monumental curved overpass structure that arcs across the sky. The industrial backdrop fades into the distance as the road opens up, with the moon reappearing above the massive concrete infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a gold convertible as it travels from a claustrophobic industrial underpass into an expansive urban highway system under a twilight sky. It begins by accelerating beneath a massive elevated highway structure, where red neon strips and concrete pillars create a sense of enclosure. As the vehicle makes a sharp right turn, the scene opens into a wide boulevard lined with palm trees, revealing a purple dusk sky and a distant city skyline. The camera then follows the car as it merges onto an open highway, overtaking traffic and passing through a heavily industrialized corridor dominated by towering smokestacks and large billboards. Finally, the road sweeps into a right curve on an elevated highway, passing beneath a monumental curved overpass that arcs across the sky as the industrial landscape fades into the distance.
